charts.title: Fig 20
charts.caption: position reversal at 0/50/5000 MCS.
charts.simulations: GENERATED by pbg-cpm — our own Cellular Potts simulation output. This reproduces the paper's setup (its exact contact energies, initial condition, temperature/λ and the 1 MCS = 16 sweeps convention) and is named after the paper's figure it corresponds to. It is NOT scanned, traced, or copied from the PDF, and no published data points are overlaid — every value is computed from our simulation run for this study.
charts.interpretation: Dark cells sort OUTWARD, surrounding the light cells, the reversed pattern predicted for gamma_lM>gamma_dM (Figs 20-21).
